tabs.label: Critiques
tabs.description: Short critical essays on Buddhist texts, interpretations, and contemporary scholarship.

articles.title: A Note on Dependent Origination
articles.description: On the common conflation of paṭicca-samuppāda with a cosmological narrative, and why a process reading is more faithful to the suttas.

tabs.label: Series
tabs.description: Extended reading series working through major texts and collections.

articles.title: Majjhima Nikāya Readings — Part I
articles.description: Beginning a close reading of the Middle-Length Discourses, starting with the Mūlapariyāya Sutta (MN 1).

tabs.label: Papers
tabs.description: Academic-style papers and research notes on Pāli, Sanskrit, and Buddhist philosophy.

articles.title: The Two Truths Doctrine in Early Buddhism
articles.description: An examination of sammuti-sacca and paramattha-sacca as found in the Abhidhamma Piṭaka and commentarial literature.

tabs.label: Translations
tabs.description: Original translations from Pāli, Sanskrit, and Classical Chinese Buddhist texts.

articles.title: Dhammapada Verses 1–2: The Twin Verses
articles.description: A new translation of the opening verses of the Dhammapada with annotation.

tabs.label: Analysis
tabs.description: Close textual analysis of Nikāya suttas and Abhidhamma structures.

articles.title: MN 1 Mūlapariyāya: Structural Analysis
articles.description: Structural analysis of the Mūlapariyāya Sutta's four-level schema of perception and its implications for Abhidhamma psychology.
